transcript: Speaker A: [screaming and crying in frustration] Speaker B: Instruments that record, analyze, summarize, organize, debate and explain information that are illustrated, non-illustrated, hardbound, paperback, jacketed, non-jacketed, with forward, introduction, table of contents, index, that are intended for the enlightenment, understanding, enrichment, enhancement and education of the human brain through sensory route of vision.
on_screen_text:
कोचिंग क्लासेस पर हज़ारों रुपये खर्च करने के बाद मेरी इंग्लिश [My English after spending thousands of rupees on coaching classes]
MySivi ऐप पर सिर्फ 3 रुपये का ट्रायल लेने के बाद मेरी इंग्लिश [My English after taking a trial of just 3 rupees on MySivi app]
summary: The ad uses a split-screen meme from the movie '3 Idiots' to contrast expensive coaching classes with the MySivi app. The top panel shows frustration after spending thousands on classes, while the bottom panel shows fluent English delivery after a 3-rupee trial on MySivi.
